label: Typical value (USD)
description: Typical home value (ZHVI-style index from Zillow Research CSVs you ingest). Source: Zillow Research Data.

label: Change vs year ago (YoY %)
description: Year-over-year percent change in typical home value from your Zillow Research export (latest month vs same month prior year).

label: Change vs prior month (MoM %)
description: Month-over-month percent change when your ingest includes consecutive month columns (see ingest script).

label: Home Sales
description: Homes sold (exact definition follows the Redfin Data Center file you ingest).

label: Home Sales Growth (YoY)
description: Year-over-year change in home sales from your Redfin Data Center export.

label: Days on Market
description: Median days on market when present in your Redfin ingest.
